channel.title: GitHub VHDL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of VHDL in GitHub

item.title: OSVVM/OSVVM
item.description: OSVVM Utility Library: AlertLogPkg, CoveragePkg, RandomPkg, ScoreboardGenericPkg, MemoryPkg, TbUtilPkg, TranscriptPkg, ...

item.title: stnolting/neorv32
item.description: A size-optimized, customizable full-scale 32-bit RISC-V soft-core CPU and SoC written in platform-independent VHDL.

item.title: htqin/awesome-model-quantization
item.description: A list of papers, docs, codes about model quantization. This repo is aimed to provide the info for model quantization research, we are continuously improving the project. Welcome to PR the works (papers, repositories) that are missed by the repo.

item.title: slaclab/surf
item.description: A huge VHDL library for FPGA development
